question: You can vote for two different people at once.
The voting machine is called an EVM.
Elections in India happen every 10 years.
A Chief Minister leads the state government.
You can see who your friend voted for on a screen.
Schools are often used as places to vote.
Candidates can give gifts to voters to get votes.
The Prime Minister is the leader of the country.
You must be a citizen of India to vote.
You can vote at any time of the night.
